source_commit: 0cf7fb0 task6-ddr3: prepare v95 native WDF push visibility
reason_not_programmed: Yosys CHECK reported 576 conflicting drivers on generated DFI write-data nets before routing; the build was intentionally interrupted instead of programming an invalid bitstream.
interpretation: v95 fixed the telemetry version source and attempted to gate DFI write-data replacement, but the generated RTL contains four repeated assignments to the same DFI write-data and mask buses. Replacing each repeated assignment with a ternary produced four independent mux drivers on the same nets, creating 576 multi-driver conflicts. This invalidates v95 before board testing.
next_action: Change the generated RTL patch so the DFI buses have exactly one driver: replace only the first assignment with the gated expression and remove or neutralize the duplicate repeated assignments, or patch a single upstream signal instead of all four repeated assigns. Keep the compact status-byte push visibility after the multi-driver issue is fixed.
